query:
-- ABB services without Carbon API verification
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_abb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as verified_by_carbon,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unverified_abb
FROM services WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND status != 'terminated';

-- Sample of unverified ABB services to understand their data quality
SELECT externalId, customerExternalId, plan, technology, avcId, carbonServiceId, dataSource
FROM services 
WHERE provider = 'ABB' AND carbonServiceId IS NULL AND status != 'terminated'
LIMIT 20;

-- Check what providers exist and how many are unverified
SELECT provider, 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN carbonServiceId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_carbon_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avcId IS NOT NULL AND avcId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_avc
FROM services 
WHERE status != 'terminated'
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY total DESC;
